summary: Support teams manually read, prioritize, route, and respond to tickets, creating delays and inconsistent handling.
TriageIQ is an AI-assisted support triage system that predicts priority, recommends routing, scores SLA risk, and drafts first responses.
Uses ticket text to detect high-priority tickets. Optimized for recall because missing urgent tickets is more costly than reviewing extra tickets.
Uses grouped business routing categories to reduce label overlap and improve routing reliability.
Uses transparent rule-based scoring because optional SLA ML models did not show strong predictive signal.
AI outputs are recommendations. Human agents review routing decisions and response drafts before action.
Reduces manual triage effort, catches urgent tickets earlier, improves routing consistency, and speeds up customer acknowledgement.
Some datasets are synthetic/anonymized; routing uses broader groups; production use would require real company data, monitoring, and retraining.
